_doc: Golden contract-v2 reply for the refine_requirements_v2 fixture pair (sp4b-2). Offline replay: validates the v2 gate (schema, narration-keys-to-real-items, trust boundary, markdown-seam, relocated-verbatim, three-verdict enum) WITHOUT a model. Authored to PASS every gate; the negative trust-boundary case is generated in-code from this object. The item_notes keys are the three real summarize(diff_blocks(old,new)).items: added FR-021, modified FR-001, removed the cast-explore scope bullet.

narration.overview: FR-001 was reworded to keep HOW content non-binding, a new deterministic-id requirement (FR-021) was added, and the cast-explore out-of-scope exclusion was dropped.

item_notes.note: Introduces a deterministic-id guarantee that did not exist in the prior version.
Rephrased but still leads with WHAT content and confines HOW to a non-binding section.

item_notes.heading_or_ref: - Changes to the exploration pipeline (cast-explore) itself.
item_notes.note: The cast-explore exclusion line was removed from Out of Scope.

verdicts.new_quoted_text: The refined output shall lead with WHAT content (intent, outcomes, scope) at the top of the document
verdicts.reasoning: FR-001 was reworded but still leads with WHAT and confines HOW to a non-binding section, so the content survives and is re-anchored rather than resolved.
The cast-explore exploration-pipeline exclusion was removed entirely from the new version.

verdicts.new_quoted_text: Workflow classification could surface as standard pills at the top of the document.
verdicts.reasoning: The pill idea is unchanged and still present verbatim, so its anchor still resolves.
